name: PickerInputNPoints
summary: The PickerInputNPoints class represents a pick of several points in a view. Used for values asked by UI.Picker.PickPoints(StringList Prompts, out PointList PickedPoints, out ViewBase PickedView) and UI.Picker.PickPoints(int NumberOfPicks, StringList Prompts, out PointList PickedPoints, out ViewBase PickedView).

constructors.name: PickerInputNPoints
constructors.summary: Creates a new PickerInputNPoints instance representing N points selected in a view.

params.name: pickedView
params.doc: The view in which the pick occurred.

params.name: pickedPoints
params.doc: The list of picked points in the view coordinates.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

properties.name: PickedPoints
properties.summary: Gets or sets the list of picked points in the view coordinates.

properties.name: PickedView
properties.summary: The view within which the pick occurred.
